  --sourcedirectory          Required. Directory of the files to be packed.

  --versionprovider          Relative path to the file which should be used to 
                             determine the version of the package and the 
                             version of a client installed on a user's 
                             machine.May not be specified and will be taken 
                             from the package specs in this case.

  --packagespecsfile         Required. Path to the package specifications file.

  --projectionspecsfile      Path to the package projection specifications 
                             file.

  --updatesspecsfile         Path to the package updates specifications file.

  --updatenotesfiles         Files containing package update notes. Supposed 
                             that each file contains a localized version of the
                             package notes.

  --workingdirectory         Path to the working directory to build a package.

  --force                    True if push the package even in case when the 
                             same package is already present on the host. The 
                             package entry in the update manifest will be 
                             updated.

  --forceifemptynotes        True if push the package if update notes file is 
                             specified but no update notes have been found for 
                             this version of the package.

  --azureconnectionstring    

  --azurerootcontainer       

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

staticCommands.name: GetUpdateNotes
staticCommands.description: Retrieves notes for the specific update and locale.

options.description: Name of the package of the desired update.
Locale of the desired update notes.

staticCommands.name: PushUpdate
staticCommands.description: Builds a package and uploads it to the files host

options.description: Directory of the files to be packed.
Path to the package specifications file.

Relative path to the file which should be used to determine the version of the package and the version of a client installed on a user's machine.May not be specified and will be taken from the package specs in this case.
Path to the package projection specifications file.
Path to the package updates specifications file.
Files containing package update notes. Supposed that each file contains a localized version of the package notes.
Custom properties to be attached to the package in the format: "PropertyName1:PropertyValue2, PropertyName2:PropertyValue2"
Path to the working directory to build a package.
True if push the package even in case when the same package is already present on the host. The package entry in the update manifest will be updated.
True if push the package if update notes file is specified but no update notes have been found for this version of the package.
